Video.summary: Chef and restaurateur Melba Wilson schools Matthew on the art of her legendary shrimp and grits.
Video.title: Melba Wilson: A Harlem Icon

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch takes on the science of transforming spaces.
Video.title: The Science Behind Kitchens & Bedrooms

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch transforms everything from small rooms to outdoor spaces.
Video.title: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch breaks down the basic formulas for successful design.
Video.title: The Principles of Space Planning

Video.title: Burgers and Babka: Viral Sensations

Video.summary: Matthew meets Ethiopian-born Chef Fariyal Abdullahi and gets a hands-on lesson in creating Doro Wat.
Video.title: Fariyal Abdullahi: From Ethiopia to the Met Gala

Fariyal Abdullahi: From Ethiopia to the Met Gala

Video.summary: Captain Boomies meets Tom Biddix—a yachtsman who helped design the demo yacht they take for a spin.
Video.title: Tom's "Team Monarch"

Video.summary: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.
Video.title: The Gambin's "Offline"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies tours Wharf Rat, a Bahamian-blue beauty built for fun, travel, and serious sport.
Video.title: Captain Gill's "Wharf Rat"

Video.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.
Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Anne-Marie Barton invites you through the gate to this stately, traditional yet modern home.
Video.title: Historical Modern Heirloom Estate

Video.summary: Kayla and Ryan have a newborn and a toddler and need both functionality and style in their space.
Video.title: Kayla & Ryan’s Toddler To-Do List

Video.summary: Eduardo and Gabriela's ‘little’ home projects have piled up and they’re ready for Drew’s help.
Video.title: Eduardo & Gabriela’s Guest Retreat

Video.summary: Join Sabrina for a masterclass in stress-free hosting, ambiance, and the very best cosmic vibes.
Video.title: Stars & Celebrations

Video.summary: Matthew tours pedigreed estates in San Marino and Pasadena, California.
Video.title: San Marino & Pasadena Pedigreed Estates

Video.summary: Sabrina's expert guests guide her on a personal journey to wellness from the inside out.
Video.title: Whole Body, Mind & Spirit

Video.summary: Kristen and Michael help prospective buyers Malachi and Christina purchase their first vacation home.
Video.title: Starbreaker Ranch at Joshua Tree

Video.summary: Real estate investor Bara helps guide Gillian through the purchase of her first short-term rental home.
Video.title: Austin's Casa Azul

Video.summary: Matthew heads to Pasadena, the picture-perfect backdrop for a home like no other.
Video.title: Pasadena Billionaire's Bunker

Video.summary: Homeworthy founders Alison Kenworthy and Michael Koenigs open the door to their Manhattan apartment.
Video.title: NYC Family Home: Homeworthy Founders

Video.summary: Renowned designer Bunny Williams opens the doors to her beautiful 1860s Falls Village estate.
Video.title: Home of a Design Icon: The Country Home & Gardens of Bunny Williams

Video.title: Beverly Hills Ultimate Estates

Video.title: Down to the Wire

Video.summary: With power finally in place, the Maxams begin to ready the resort for opening.
Video.title: Sewing Up Loose Ends

Video.summary: The town of Sodus shows up as the Maxams unveil The Finger Lakes Treehouse Resort.
Video.title: Ribbon Cutting

Video.title: Prismatic & Patterned LA Bungalow

Video.summary: Jack and Tyler have made their home picture-perfect, but now it’s time for the exterior to shine.
Video.title: Jack & Tyler’s Colorful Curb Appeal

Video.summary: Get ready for an easy breakfast hack, a laugh-out-loud DIY session, and expert skincare tips.
Video.title: Laughs, Lunch & Lifts

Video.summary: Join Sabrina for a feast for the eyes, body, and soul with laughs and great conversation.
Video.title: Cocina De Sabrina

Video.summary: In this dream home, Don Massenburg delivers a masterclass in color, texture, and next-level style.
Video.title: Stunning Southern Modern Manor
